# uptimekuma_monitor_kafka_producer (Resource)

Kafka Producer monitor resource for testing connectivity to Apache Kafka clusters and verifying message publishing capabilities.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Kafka Producer Monitor Resource Example

# Basic Kafka Producer monitor with minimum required configuration
resource "uptimekuma_monitor_kafka_producer" "basic" {
  name    = "Kafka Producer Monitor"
  brokers = ["kafka.example.com:9092"]
  topic   = "uptime-monitor"
  message = "ping"
}

# Kafka Producer monitor connecting to a multi-broker cluster
resource "uptimekuma_monitor_kafka_producer" "cluster" {
  name = "Kafka Cluster Monitor"
  brokers = [
    "kafka-1.example.com:9092",
    "kafka-2.example.com:9092",
    "kafka-3.example.com:9092",
  ]
  topic                     = "uptime-monitor"
  message                   = "ping"
  ssl                       = true
  allow_auto_topic_creation = false
  interval                  = 120
  retry_interval            = 60
  max_retries               = 3
}

# Kafka Producer monitor with SASL authentication
resource "uptimekuma_monitor_kafka_producer" "sasl" {
  name    = "Kafka Producer SASL"
  brokers = ["kafka.example.com:9093"]
  topic   = "uptime-monitor"
  message = "ping"
  ssl     = true
  sasl_options = jsonencode({
    mechanism = "scram-sha-512"
    username  = "monitor-user"
    password  = "monitor-password"
  })

  notification_ids = [1, 2]

  tags = [
    {
      tag_id = 1
      value  = "production"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `brokers` (List of String) List of Kafka broker addresses (e.g. `host:port`).
- `message` (String) Test message to publish to the Kafka topic.
- `name` (String) Friendly name
- `topic` (String) Kafka topic to publish the test message to.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Monitor is active
- `allow_auto_topic_creation` (Boolean) Whether to allow automatic topic creation on the Kafka broker.
- `description` (String) Description
- `interval` (Number) Heartbeat interval in seconds
- `max_retries` (Number) Maximum number of retries
- `notification_ids` (List of Number) List of notification IDs
- `parent` (Number) Parent monitor ID for hierarchical organization
- `resend_interval` (Number) Resend interval in seconds
- `retry_interval` (Number) Retry interval in seconds
- `sasl_options` (String, Sensitive) SASL authentication options as a JSON-encoded object (e.g. `{"mechanism":"plain","username":"u","password":"p"}`).
- `ssl` (Boolean) Whether to enable SSL/TLS for the Kafka connection.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Set of tags assigned to this monitor (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `upside_down` (Boolean) Invert monitor status (treat DOWN as UP and vice versa)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `tag_id` (Number) Tag ID

Optional:

- `value` (String) Optional value for this tag
